description: I build robust and performant digital solutions by leveraging my programming skills.
aboutDescription: Passionate about technology and web development, I love to create innovative applications that meet users' needs. With a strong knowledge of various programming languages and frameworks, I am always seeking new challenges to enhance my skills and contribute to exciting projects.
technologiesDescription: Throughout my journey, I have developed a particular affinity for frameworks such as Next and React, as well as languages such as TypeScript, Python, C#, and Java. I am also comfortable with TailwindCSS, Git, Google Cloud, PostgreSQL, and Supabase.

projectsDescriptions.1: A Visual Studio Code extension that helps developers avoid letting sensitive info appearing in their commits, made with TypeScript.
projectsDescriptions.2: An administrative AI chatbot made for the city of Antony (Hauts-De-Seine, France), created as part of the DevLab project in the M1 Lead Dev Full-Stack program at IIM Higher School, made with NextJS and Mistral's API.
projectsDescriptions.3: A simple thumbnail extractor using YouTube's API, made with Javascript and HTML.
projectsDescriptions.4: A React Native application that allows you to create decks, add cards to those decks, and study your courses.
projectsDescriptions.5: An Expo app that provides running competitions organizers with a fully functional solution that allows them to track runners on a map in real-time, as well as providing a live streaming feature for each runner for their friends and family to follow them.
projectsDescriptions.6: A SaaS platform for content creators (creation, organization, management, analytics...), made as a projectfor front-end architecture course at IIM, built with Vite & Supabase.

form.description: Want to get in touch? Fill out the form below to send me an email!
form.name: Full name
form.message: Write your message here... (the message cannot contain links)

alerts.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
alerts.linkDetected: A link was detected in your message. Please remove all links and try again.
alerts.messageSent: Your message has been sent successfully! I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
